case_title: JIEBIN LIANG VS. HERTZ CLAIM MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, JIEBIN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2015 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LIANG, JIEBIN AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CLAIM MANAGEMENT CORPORATION DTG OPERATIONS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, JIEBIN AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CLAIM MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DTG OPERATIONS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMY LO. DEFENDANT DTG PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SUSAN SWANSON. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, JIEBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DTG OPERATIONS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
